scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend,ml" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed && cd ../frontend && npm install
